title: Item
description: Represents an inventory item entity in Dynamics 365 Business Central. Items are the goods or services that the company buys, sells, or holds in inventory. Each item record contains pricing, categorization, unit of measure, tax, and posting group information.

id.description: The unique identifier (GUID) of the item record

number.description: The item number, a unique business identifier assigned automatically or manually

displayName.description: The primary display name or description of the item

displayName2.description: A secondary display name or additional description for the item

type.description: The type of item: Inventory (physical goods tracked in stock), Service (labor or services), or Non-Inventory (physical goods not tracked in stock)

itemCategoryId.description: The unique identifier of the item category

itemCategoryCode.description: The code of the item category used for grouping and reporting

blocked.description: Indicates whether the item is blocked from being used in transactions

gtin.description: The Global Trade Item Number (barcode) for the item

inventory.description: The current quantity in inventory (read-only, computed from item ledger entries)

unitPrice.description: The default selling unit price of the item

priceIncludesTax.description: Indicates whether the unit price includes tax

unitCost.description: The unit cost of the item used for inventory valuation

taxGroupId.description: The unique identifier of the tax group for the item

taxGroupCode.description: The tax group code that determines how the item is taxed

baseUnitOfMeasureId.description: The unique identifier of the base unit of measure

baseUnitOfMeasureCode.description: The base unit of measure code (e.g., PCS, KG, EA)

generalProductPostingGroupId.description: The unique identifier of the general product posting group

generalProductPostingGroupCode.description: The general product posting group code used for G/L account mapping

inventoryPostingGroupId.description: The unique identifier of the inventory posting group

inventoryPostingGroupCode.description: The inventory posting group code used for inventory valuation posting

lastModifiedDateTime.description: The date and time the item record was last modified (read-only)
